testcase.name: test_happy_path
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist.py:44: in test_happy_path assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_da45b0313e@yayhop.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_duplicate_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist.py:54: in test_duplicate_email assert r1.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_count_increments_after_signup
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_waitlist.py:86: in test_count_increments_after_signup assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
